title: Skill Point Items
description: Adds items to LevelZ that increase your skills
body:
Adds in 12 new items for [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz), 1 for each stat, that level up your skills.

![Every Skill Point Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d2342d2da2b90b2a89e4c131214dff0ace80d36.png)

These items have a 1/8th chance to be found in any vanilla minecraft structure.

This datapack requires [Loot Table Modifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-table-modifier) for the items to be found.
